titleStmt.title: SII 7.209: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 209. (A.R. No. 39 of 1901). ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE WALL OF THE KSHETRAPALA SHRINE IN THE HOSABASTI AT THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ . jīyāttrailōkyanātha
sya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ . śrīmat śakavarṣa 1398 ya durmmukhi saṁvatsarada māgha
śu 10 śukravāradalu virupākṣarāyaru siṁhāsanasthitarāgiralu siṁgappadaṁ
ṇnāyakara kāladalli viṭhṭharasoḍeyaru maṁgalūrarājya sthitarāgirdda kāladalli cā
rukīrttipaṁḍitadēvarugaḷa nirūpadiṁda bidireya yeṁṭuprajeseṭṭikāṟaru nālva reḷame
gaḷoḷagāda samastahalaru śrīcaṁdraprabhasvāmiya tribhuvanacūḍāmaṇiyeṁba
caityālayada naḍuvaṇaneleya yeraḍu gaṁdhakuṭigaḷanu pēraḷada karaṇaṁtata baḷiya
mellaṁṭa sauṭereseṭṭiyaru Avaraḷiya ciṭṭipāḍiya kēciya dēvaruseṭṭiyaru yiṁtiva
rgge dharmmavātsalyadiṁ koṭṭa vivara . tamage svarggāpavarggavāgabēkeṁba bhāvadiṁda Ā ṭhā
vige yōgyavaha dēhāra ṭhāṇadīvige modalāda Upakaraṇaṁgaḷanu koḍisi koṭṭu [A]lli
ya nityanaimittika pūjegaḷige Acaṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi naḍavahāge vṛttikṣētragaḷanū viṁ
gaḍisikoṭṭu Aparimitavaha kīrttiyanu puṇyavanu Upārjjisikoṁḍaru . Adakke biṭṭa kṣētra
da vivara . mūḍillaradēśadalli nālkūroḷagoṁdenisida keṁmutemaralli saṁkaravojōṁtiṟeṁ
ba brāhmaṇanamūlada bayelagaddega ḷeraḍanu nālnūṟu saṁṇapratāpaṁgaḷanū koṭṭu
hāravāgi hiḍidu A kṣētradiṁda gēṇiyāgi biṭṭu Allige salluva baḷanārtthateṟale
kkada Akkiya mūḍe 30 Akṣaradallu mūvattu . A vṛttiyiṁda gaṁdhakuṭiya Amṛ
tapaḍi naḍadubahudu . Āruvārigaḷu A hoṁnanu biṭṭarādare halarū A vārigaḷe
honnanisikoṁḍu mattoṁdu yōgyavaha ṭhāvige hāki Ā naivēdyavanū naḍasibaharu .
gaṁdhakuṭiya pūjeya naḍasuva pūjārige bastiya teṁkaṇadikkina pūjārigaḷa keregaḷa
ṁdu maneyanu halaru koṭṭaru . Ā maneyalliddu Ā dēvara pūjeyanu naḍasūdu .
Digital edition of SII 7.209 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
